Upload Raw Life Policy List

From AHO, open Clients → All Clients → Download Report → Life Policy List. It will be decrypted, cleaned, and pushed straight into your Dues Tracker.

☁️

Drag & drop your file here, or click to browse

Only Excel (.xlsx) files are supported

🔒 Your data is secure and encrypted in transit.
🔒
  • JCC Business Solutions · Dues Tracker Parser · Only "Premium paying" policies are imported. Skipped automatically: Lapsed, Paid-Up, Surrendered, Extended Term.
  • The developer has no access to uploaded files under any circumstance — everything is processed in your browser and pushed only into your own Google Sheet once set up.

Upload Raw Client List

From AHO, open Clients → All Clients → Download Report → Client List. It will be decrypted, cleaned, and pushed into your Birthday Tracker.

☁️

Drag & drop your file here, or click to browse

Only Excel (.xlsx) files are supported

🔒 Your data is secure and encrypted in transit.
🔒
  • JCC Business Solutions · Birthday Tracker Parser · All individual clients with a recorded birthdate are imported.
  • The developer has no access to uploaded files under any circumstance — everything is processed in your browser and pushed only into your own Google Sheet once set up.
